PREFIX rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX hb:   <https://healthbatt.projects01.open-semantic-lab.org/id/>

SELECT ?price
WHERE {
  ?cell rdf:type hb:Category-3AOSW60482870f8fc406782f60295bf7a09e3 .
  ?cell rdfs:label 'LG INR18650 MH1' .
  ?cell hb:Property-3AHasSerialNumber ?serial .
  FILTER ( REGEX(?serial, '^L[0-9]+') ) .
  ?price a hb:Price .
  ?price hb:Property-3AHasValue ?value .
  ?price hb:Property-3AIsBasedOn ?cell .
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?value), '.*/', '') AS ?priceValue)
  FILTER (?priceValue = '25')
}
